task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the puzzle section within GCompris
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'puzzle' category (often represented by a puzzle piece icon) is selected or visible in the GCompris navigation menu.
The Tangram activity screen is open, displaying a set of geometric tangram pieces and a target shape outline.

task_completion.description: Move geometric pieces towards the target outline
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tangram pieces are displaced from their initial starting area and are being dragged, rotated, or placed near/inside the target outline.

task_completion.description: Complete at least one tangram figure
task_completion.visual_evidence: All geometric pieces perfectly fit inside the target outline with no gaps or overlapping outside the lines, often accompanied by a success animation, a completed state, or transition to the next level.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GCompris graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual GCompris application window being clicked and manipulated, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual GCompris software, not an image viewer or web browser
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains genuine GCompris UI elements (menus, control bars, specific icons) and is not a web browser playing a different tangram game or an image viewer showing a static picture.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the task by copying a pre-existing image to the output path
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible showing commands like 'cp' or 'wget' moving an image file to /tmp/tangram_final.png.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is GCompris (gcompris-qt). The activity is categorized under the 'puzzle' section and its actual display name is 'The tangram puzzle game'. The final expected screenshot is saved to /tmp/tangram_final.png.
